provenance: WorldBible section 9: glass-and-metal sphere; lights when fed Alir; lasts long; releasing the energy too suddenly shatters it (Chala's gift to Eric). Capacity 5000 cu / spike 2000 per ARCHITECTURE section 1 decision 14.
notes: Chargeable lamp: warm white ramp, no saturation heat (canon says it lights, never that it heats). shatterOnSpike backs the ARCHITECTURE section 11 Chromatis Experiment: an EnergyDischarged rate above 2000 cu/tick within Chebyshev radius 2 (including self) converts it to lightstone_shards. Semi-transparent (opacity 12, glass body) - invented, needs Eli's blessing. All chargeable/spike values fit 16 bits.
